panels.description: Overall error rate as percentage of failed requests over time
panels.title: Error Rate Over Time

panels.description: Requests volume trends over time
panels.title: Requests Volume Over Time

panels.description: Requests Volume by component and role
panels.title: Requests Volume by Component

panels.description: End-to-end request latency percentiles over time
panels.title: End-to-End Request Latency

panels.description: Time to First Token latency percentiles over time
panels.title: Latency Trends (TTFT)

panels.description: Time per output token latency percentiles over time
panels.title: Time per Output Token (TPOT)

panels.description: Inter-token latency (time between consecutive output tokens) at the model level. Reflects streaming responsiveness — high values mean choppy token delivery.
panels.title: Inter-Token Latency

panels.description: Token consumption breakdown over time
panels.title: Token Consumption (Input vs Output)

panels.description: Queue time percentiles - time requests spent waiting before processing
panels.title: Queue Time (Waiting Phase)

panels.description: Number of requests waiting in queue by component
panels.title: Requests Waiting in Queue

panels.description: Number of requests currently being processed by component
panels.title: Requests Running (Processing)

panels.description: Average number of tokens per request over time
panels.title: Token Distribution per Request

panels.description: KV cache utilization percentage over time
panels.title: KV Cache Utilization Over Time

panels.description: KV cache utilization split by phase (prefill vs decode). Identifies which phase is exhausting cache capacity.
panels.title: KV Cache by Phase (Prefill vs Decode)

panels.description: Number of requests waiting in queue split by phase. Shows whether prefill or decode pods are backed up.
panels.title: Requests Waiting by Phase

panels.description: Time to First Token P95 split by phase (prefill vs decode pods)
panels.title: TTFT by Phase (P95)

panels.description: Time spent in the prefill phase (P95). High prefill time indicates compute-bound prefill or large prompt sizes.
panels.title: Prefill Time (P95)

panels.description: Time spent in the decode phase (P95). High decode time indicates output generation bottleneck.
panels.title: Decode Time (P95)

panels.description: Request volume by component type (workload, workload-leader, workload-worker, etc.). Shows traffic distribution across Wide EP topology.
panels.title: Request Volume by Component (Leader/Worker)

panels.description: KV cache utilization by component type. Identifies if leader or worker nodes in Wide EP are exhausting cache.
panels.title: KV Cache by Component (Leader/Worker)

panels.description: Percentage of prefix cache hits vs queries. Dropping hit rate indicates workload pattern change or cache eviction pressure.
panels.title: Prefix Cache Hit Rate

panels.description: Rate of request preemptions due to KV cache memory pressure. Sustained preemptions indicate insufficient serving capacity.
panels.title: Preemptions Rate

panels.description: Compares queue time (scheduling delay) vs inference time (compute time). If queue_time >> inference_time, the problem is insufficient replicas. If inference_time is high but queue_time is low, the bottleneck is within the engine.
panels.title: Queue Time vs Inference Time (P95)

panels.description: Scheduler-level queue depth and per-pod queue distribution. High scheduler queue with low per-pod queues indicates scheduling bottleneck.
panels.title: Scheduler Queue Depth

panels.description: Gateway-level TTFT P99 per model. Includes routing overhead on top of vLLM TTFT. Compare with vLLM TTFT to measure routing latency contribution.
panels.title: Gateway vs vLLM TTFT (P99)

panels.description: Gateway-level TPOT P99 per model. Includes routing overhead. Compare with vLLM TPOT to isolate routing contribution.
panels.title: Gateway vs vLLM TPOT (P99)

panels.description: Rate of disaggregation routing decisions by type. Shows the mix of decode-only, prefill-decode, encode-decode, and encode-prefill-decode routing in disaggregated deployments.
panels.title: Disaggregation Routing Decisions

panels.description: Breakdown of prompt tokens by source: local compute, local cache hit, or external KV transfer. Shows how much computation is being saved by caching.
panels.title: Prompt Tokens by Source

panels.description: Cross-instance KV connector cache hit rate. Measures effectiveness of distributed prefix sharing across disaggregated workers.
panels.title: External Prefix Cache Hit Rate

panels.description: 99th percentile input and output token counts per request at the gateway level. Identifies unexpectedly large prompts or long generations.
panels.title: Token Distribution P99 (Gateway)

title: AI / Model Serving / LLMs / Model Performance & Usage
